title: Math, time, random, and conversion unit tests
description:
Add unit tests for the new math, time, random, and conversion functions.

Add tests to the existing test file pattern (likely pkg/stdlib/stdlib_test.go or create new files as appropriate).

Math tests (see spec section 9.2):
- sin(0)=0, sin(pi/2)=1 (±1e-10), cos(0)=1, cos(pi)=-1, tan(0)=0
- asin(0)=0, asin(1)=pi/2, acos(1)=0, atan(0)=0, atan2(1,0)=pi/2
- log(1)=0, log2(8)=3, log10(100)=2, exp(0)=1, exp(1)≈e
- pi()=math.Pi, e()=math.E
- gcd(12,8)=4, gcd(0,5)=5, gcd(-12,8)=4, gcd(0,0)=0
- lcm(4,6)=12, lcm(0,5)=0
- clamp(5,0,10)=5, clamp(-5,0,10)=0, clamp(15,0,10)=10 (Int), clamp(5.5,0.0,10.0)=5.5 (Float)

Time tests:
- time_now_ms() returns positive Int
- sleep_ms(0) succeeds, sleep_ms(-1) errors

Random tests:
- random_seed(42) then random operations are deterministic
- random_shuffle preserves array length and elements
- random_choice returns element from array, errors on empty

Conversion tests:
- bool_to_string(true)="true", bool_to_string(false)="false"
- char_to_int('A')=65, char_to_int('0')=48
- int_to_char(65)='A', int_to_char(-1) errors, int_to_char(0xD800) errors
